name: Indie Hackers
desc: Community platform where indie founders share revenue metrics, experiments, product launches, and startup journeys.

name: Submarine Cable Map
desc: Interactive global map visualizing undersea internet cables, landing points, and worldwide digital infrastructure connecting continents.

name: i miss my library
desc: Ambient productivity site recreating the quiet atmosphere of libraries with realistic background sounds for studying and focused work.

name: I Miss My Cafe
desc: Relaxing browser experience simulating coffee shop ambience with customizable café sounds, rain, chatter, and background noise.

name: Postcrossing
desc: Global postcard exchange community where strangers send and receive real postcards from around the world.

name: WindowSwap
desc: Virtual window-view platform letting users experience relaxing real-world scenery and ambient sounds from homes worldwide.

name: MySketchBooth
desc: Free online vintage-style photo booth that transforms selfies into retro sketches, film strips, and nostalgic portrait effects.

name: Neal.fun
desc: Collection of highly polished interactive experiments, simulations, and educational web toys exploring science, culture, money, and absurd internet ideas.

name: Absurd Trolley Problems
desc: Darkly funny interactive moral-choice game that escalates the classic trolley problem into bizarre and increasingly impossible scenarios.

name: Radiooooo
desc: Time-travel radio platform that lets users discover music from different countries and decades through an interactive world map.

name: Animal Crossing Letter Generator
desc: Fan-made tool for creating printable Animal Crossing-style letters with authentic game-inspired layouts and typography.

name: The Art Scavenger
desc: Archive of free printable collage sheets, vintage ephemera, textures, and paper craft resources for artists and journal makers.

name: Erowid Roulette
desc: Randomized portal into unusual and often surreal experience reports sourced from Erowid’s psychoactive substance archive.

name: Erowid Psychoactive Vaults
desc: Massive educational archive documenting psychoactive substances, user reports, chemistry, culture, risks, and historical references.

name: Mercatus Center — India Political Economy Program
desc: Research initiative publishing analysis on Indian economic policy, governance, markets, institutions, and public policy reform.

name: Atlas Obscura
desc: Travel discovery platform cataloging unusual places, hidden history, strange museums, forgotten architecture, and global curiosities.

name: WINDOWS93
desc: Chaotic browser-based parody operating system packed with retro apps, memes, fake desktop tools, games, and early-internet nostalgia experiments.

name: your ai slop bores me
desc: Viral multiplayer social experiment where humans pretend to be AI chatbots and answer prompts in real time as a playful protest against AI-generated content.

name: Line Rider
desc: Classic physics sandbox game where players draw sled tracks and create kinetic animations, stunts, and music-synced motion art.

name: OldMapsOnline
desc: Historical map search engine that lets users explore digitized old maps from libraries and archives across different time periods and regions.

name: Running Reality
desc: Interactive world history simulation that models civilizations, wars, trade, politics, and technological development across time.

name: Zooniverse
desc: Citizen science platform where volunteers help researchers classify galaxies, transcribe archives, identify wildlife, and analyze scientific data.

name: Explorable Explanations
desc: Curated collection of interactive essays and simulations that teach complex concepts through hands-on visual experimentation.

name: Letters from the Future
desc: Speculative interactive storytelling project presenting fictional future letters that explore climate, technology, politics, and society.

name: The Fish Doorbell
desc: Live-streamed Dutch canal project where viewers press a virtual doorbell to help migrating fish pass through a river lock.

name: make yourself a cold coffee
desc: Playful interactive web experience that guides users through making cold coffee using animated storytelling and tactile interactions.

name: gradient.horse
desc: Massive searchable collection of CSS gradients for designers and developers exploring color palettes, backgrounds, and visual inspiration.

name: Same Energy
desc: AI-powered visual search engine that finds aesthetically similar images based on mood, style, composition, and texture instead of keywords.

name: tree.fm
desc: Ambient nature platform that streams real forest soundscapes from around the world for relaxation, focus, meditation, and virtual nature immersion.

name: City Walks Live
desc: Virtual travel platform featuring immersive walking tours through cities worldwide using long-form street exploration videos and live-style travel experiences.

name: Fields of The World
desc: Open-source global agricultural field boundary mapping platform using satellite imagery and machine learning for crop monitoring, land-use analysis, and geospatial research.

name: 3DTuning
desc: Interactive 3D car customization simulator where users can modify vehicles with body kits, wheels, paint, suspension, and tuning parts in real time.

name: F4map Demo
desc: Interactive WebGL-powered 3D map viewer built on OpenStreetMap data with realistic buildings, terrain, shadows, and city exploration.

name: Messenger
desc: Relaxing browser-based multiplayer delivery game where players explore a tiny stylized planet delivering messages in a beautifully crafted WebGL world.

name: Metazooa
desc: A daily animal guessing game that uses biological taxonomy to narrow down a mystery species.

name: Tradle
desc: A daily geography puzzle where players identify a country based on a treemap of its global export data.

name: Geocities Gallery
desc: A visual archive preserving the unique digital vernacular and design of the 1990s Geocities era.

name: Mobile Phones Museum
desc: A visual encyclopedia of mobile hardware history, featuring over 2,000 distinct devices.

name: Intertapes
desc: A digital preservation project featuring scanned media and audio from found VHS and cassettes.

name: TheToyMaker
desc: A collection of printable paper toys and vintage-inspired crafts for creative play.

name: Every Noise at Once
desc: An algorithmically-generated, interactive scatter-plot of thousands of music genres.

name: Drive & Listen
desc: An immersive experience combining 4K dashcam footage of world cities with local radio stations.

name: MyRetroTV
desc: A series of nostalgic simulators providing an authentic TV-viewing experience from past decades.

name: Worldle
desc: A daily geography game where players guess a country or territory based on its silhouette.

name: Puzzle Prime
desc: A hub for brain teasers, detective puzzles, and educational logic games for all ages.

name: Origami.me
desc: A dedicated resource for origami enthusiasts featuring diagrams, tutorials, and paper reviews.

name: World Monitor
desc: A real-time intelligence dashboard tracking global conflicts and geopolitical risks.

name: Valdevia
desc: Dude makes creepy art

name: OpenGridWorks
desc: An interactive global map of power infrastructure including operating plants, fiber cables, and transmission lines.

name: Running Reality - Early Kolkata
desc: A historical world model providing a high-fidelity geospatial timeline of Kolkata's early urban development.

name: The Valley of Code
desc: Structured web dev curriculum, free and no fluff.

name: PZ Thinking Routines
desc: Harvard's toolbox for structured thinking. Surprisingly practical.

name: Untools
desc: Mental models and thinking frameworks, one clean page each.

name: MindTools
desc: Dense but useful. Good reference when you need to get better at explaining things.

name: AlternativeTo
desc: Crowdsourced software alternatives. Beats Googling 'X but free.'

name: TinyWow
desc: Free AI + file tools. PDF, image, writing — no sign-up.

name: MyMap.ai
desc: Ideas that changed the world, mapped visually.

name: Your Logical Fallacy Is
desc: Every fallacy, named and explained. Bookmark it for arguments.

name: Your Bias Is
desc: 24 cognitive biases with clean one-liners. Sister site to the above.

name: Information Quotes — DGI
desc: Data Governance Institute's quote bank. Good for framing ideas.

name: The Information — Bookey
desc: 30 quotes from Gleick's The Information. Worth reading cold.

name: Data Quotes — CareerFoundry
desc: 23 quotes on data. Some are actually good.

name: Headline Formula List — Neil Patel
desc: PDF. Every headline pattern worth knowing, in one place.

name: Marketing Examples
desc: Harry Dry's breakdowns. Short, specific, actually useful.

name: Meta Ad Library
desc: What's running in Kolkata right now. Good reality check on local copy.

name: Ads of the World
desc: Award-level campaigns, searchable. Kolkata filter bookmarked.

name: AdEspresso Examples
desc: Facebook ad examples, curated and categorised.

name: Instapage Examples
desc: 110 landing pages with annotations. Good for structure ideas.

name: Growth Archive
desc: B2B growth marketing examples. What's working in the wild.

name: Landingfolio
desc: Landing page design inspiration. Best visual reference in this list.

name: Welcome Email Examples
desc: 15 welcome emails worth studying. GetResponse's breakdown is solid.

name: Really Good Emails
desc: The email swipe file. Searchable by type, brand, and industry.
